payload.query: I have panel data on 50 countries over 20 years. I want to estimate the effect of PR vs majoritarian systems on women's representation. What method should I use?

articles.title: A New U.S. Blockade Is Strangling Cuba
articles.abstract: An analysis of ship movements shows that the Trump administration is isolating the island at one of its most vulnerable moments.
articles.snippet: An analysis of ship movements shows that the Trump administration is isolating the island at one of its most vulnerable moments.
articles.byline: By Jack Nicas and Christiaan Triebert

articles.title: In Her Big Olympic Moment, Alysa Liu Celebrated Her Freedom
articles.abstract: Competition can wreck a figure skater, but Liu and other Olympians shed the pressure and delivered transcendent performances focused on artistry.
articles.snippet: Competition can wreck a figure skater, but Liu and other Olympians shed the pressure and delivered transcendent performances focused on artistry.

articles.title: Volunteers in Minnesota Deliver Groceries So Immigrants Can Hide at Home
articles.abstract: Thousands of Minneapolis residents have joined a church-run effort to deliver donated groceries to immigrant families who fear being caught in public by federal agents.
articles.snippet: Thousands of Minneapolis residents have joined a church-run effort to deliver donated groceries to immigrant families who fear being caught in public by federal agents.

articles.title: Grail’s Cancer Detection Test Fails in Major Study
articles.abstract: A closely watched clinical trial in Britain that screened blood for early detection of cancer did not show a reduction in diagnoses at later stages of the disease.
articles.snippet: A closely watched clinical trial in Britain that screened blood for early detection of cancer did not show a reduction in diagnoses at later stages of the disease.
articles.byline: By Rebecca Robbins and Gina Kolata

articles.title: Trump’s First Year Could Have Lasting Economic Consequences
articles.abstract: President Trump’s policies have so far done little to change the overall state of the American economy, but economists warn they will ultimately weaken the United States.
articles.snippet: President Trump’s policies have so far done little to change the overall state of the American economy, but economists warn they will ultimately weaken the United States.

articles.title: The Secretive V.I.P. Programs That Keep Gamers Spending
articles.abstract: Lucrative players of games like FarmVille and Words With Friends get personal account managers and entries to exclusive sweepstakes.
articles.snippet: Lucrative players of games like FarmVille and Words With Friends get personal account managers and entries to exclusive sweepstakes.

articles.title: Trump Presses on With Tariffs Despite Court, and Court of Public Opinion
articles.abstract: The president is plowing ahead with an unpopular policy after the Supreme Court’s rebuke, deepening his party’s risk in the midterm elections.
articles.snippet: The president is plowing ahead with an unpopular policy after the Supreme Court’s rebuke, deepening his party’s risk in the midterm elections.
articles.byline: By Shane Goldmacher and Katie Glueck

articles.title: These Skiers Cleared Out as Group That Would Be Hit by Avalanche Arrived
articles.abstract: If the party had waited out the storm in their cabins, one of the skiers said, the outcome might have been different.
articles.snippet: If the party had waited out the storm in their cabins, one of the skiers said, the outcome might have been different.

articles.title: The Supreme Court’s Declaration of Independence
articles.abstract: The court’s rejection of President Trump’s tariffs program is the latest in a series of clashes between him and Chief Justice John G. Roberts Jr.
articles.snippet: The court’s rejection of President Trump’s tariffs program is the latest in a series of clashes between him and Chief Justice John G. Roberts Jr.

articles.title: One Year In, Searching for a Strategy Behind Trump’s Unpredictability
articles.abstract: One great truth of Trump II so far is that nobody has any idea what tomorrow holds.
articles.snippet: One great truth of Trump II so far is that nobody has any idea what tomorrow holds.
